title: Make it appear 'True' if the element title (Name) is uppercase
excerpt:
Hello, 
I’d like the formula to make it appear ‘True’ if the element title (Name) is uppercase, but I can’t find a solution… 
Thanks, 
Jeans

posts.author: Jean (D)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’d like the formula to make it appear ‘True’ if the element title (Name) is uppercase, but I can’t find a solution…

Thanks,
Jeans

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Jean

This should do it:
OR(UPPER({Name})={Name})

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
Watch Our Latest Video: Creating subitems using Make/Integromat The Monday Man (EASY) Way

posts.author: Jean (D)
posts.cookedHtml: Merci beaucoup !!!
